Il ruolo di Mohammed bin Zayed e la politica estera Quando l'attuale presidente Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan era ancora 'principe ereditario', gli Emirati hanno riformato l'esercito, rendendolo tra i più addestrati ed equipaggiati della regione. In 2004 he was appointed Crown Prince, and his subsequent appointment as President the day after his father’s death was predictable, as a demonstration of unity and political continuity in the country. Quote from HananBalkhyحنان بلخي (@HananBalkhy): In Washington, D.C., during the @WorldBankGroup and @IMFNews Spring Meetings, I had a stimulating discussion with Maimouna Mbow Fam, Manager for Operations in the Fragility, Conflict and Violence (FCV) Group at the @WorldBankGroup. I welcomed the World Bank’s evolving FCV Strategy and discussed how @WHO can further strengthen its role as a key partner. This builds on our strong collaboration across the @WHOEMRO Region, particularly in Afghanistan, Gaza, Sudan, Yemen and beyond, enhancing resilience, advancing the health workforce and delivering impact where it is needed most. I look forward to advancing this partnership, building on a decade of collaboration in addressing health needs across emergency-affected countries in the Region.
